detail: Medimops JSON API scraper (momox_api.py) — 1380 ISBNs scanned in 1m50s vs 80min before. Priority tiers HOT/WARM/COLD + parallel scanning with asyncio.Semaphore(3). 2 live deals found on first scan.
value-based priority scoring: 198 HOT (>=50€) / 896 WARM (>=20€) / 286 COLD, Discord test fix
Continuous scan mode: sequential loop scanning all 1380 ISBNs at ~1 req/s, ~23 min cycle, dashboard scan status panel adapted
Parallel scanning (3 workers, ~10 req/s, ~3 min cycle), fix Acheter 404 links, update all docs for continuous scan strategy
